case_title: SAVAGE, DONALD G. RECEIVER vs. HARRIS, LEONARD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAVAGE, DONALD G. RECEIVER AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, LEONARD HARRIS, JULIE M. DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAVAGE, DONALD G. RECEIVER AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, LEONARD HARRIS, JULIE M. DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1994, OVERRULED PER STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT BETWEEN PARTIES. SEE EXECUTED COPIES OF STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT.

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
